title: Li Auto Gross Profit and Margin Trend Analysis
text: Li Auto's gross profit analysis shows significant trends from 2020-2024. 2023 marked Li Auto's first year of profitability with demonstrated strong gross margin performance throughout the year, with quarterly gross margins reaching 20.4%, 21.8%, 22.0%, and 23.5% in the four quarters of 2023, with an annual gross margin of 22.2%. Gross profit was RMB27.50 billion in 2023, representing a 212.8% increase from RMB8.79 billion in 2022, with gross margin reaching 22.2% compared to 19.4% in 2022. 2024 showed a different trajectory with the company's annual gross profit rising 7.9% to RMB29.7 billion, though the gross margin narrowed to 20.5%, down from 22.2% in 2023. Quarterly performance revealed a declining trend: in Q3 2024, gross margin rebounded above 20%, achieving 21.5%, with vehicle gross margin at 20.9%. In Q4 2024, gross margin narrowed to 20.3%, compared to 23.5% in Q4 2023. The vehicle margin slipped to 19.8% in 2024 from 21.5% in the prior year, signaling increased cost pressures and competitive intensity.
